{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Gold workers
| introduced = cradle-08-wintersteel
}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Pride]] was supervising the return of the [[Gold workers]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c19">''Wintersteel'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
